diagrams.name: core_architecture
diagrams.title: Core Architecture & Service Provider
diagrams.description: Top-level facade, manager, and service provider wiring the entire AI package together

diagrams.name: feature_facades
diagrams.title: AI Feature Facades
diagrams.description: High-level entry-point classes for each AI capability: text, image, audio, transcription, embeddings, reranking

diagrams.name: file_and_store_management
diagrams.title: File & Vector Store Management
diagrams.description: Classes for uploading, managing, and deleting AI files and vector stores

diagrams.name: pending_responses
diagrams.title: Pending Response Builder Classes
diagrams.description: Fluent builder objects used to configure and dispatch AI generation requests before execution

diagrams.name: agent_system
diagrams.title: Agent System
diagrams.description: Core agent abstractions including anonymous agents, structured output agents, queued prompts, and the Promptable trait

diagrams.name: agent_contracts
diagrams.title: Agent & Capability Contracts
diagrams.description: Interfaces and contracts that agents implement: Agent, Conversational, HasTools, HasStructuredOutput, and related contracts

diagrams.name: message_system
diagrams.title: Message System
diagrams.description: Message hierarchy representing conversation roles: base Message, UserMessage, AssistantMessage, ToolResultMessage, and MessageRole enum

diagrams.name: tools_system
diagrams.title: Tools System
diagrams.description: Tool interface, request handling, and built-in tools such as SimilaritySearch
diagrams.scope: Tool contract, request, and built-in tools

diagrams.name: schema_system
diagrams.title: Schema & Structured Output
diagrams.description: Schema classes used for structured output and tool definitions: base Schema and ObjectSchema

diagrams.name: provider_contracts
diagrams.title: Provider Contracts & Interfaces
diagrams.description: Interfaces defining the contract for each AI provider type: text, audio, image, embedding, reranking, transcription, file, and store providers

diagrams.name: provider_implementations
diagrams.title: Provider Implementations
diagrams.description: Concrete provider driver implementations (e.g. OpenAI, Anthropic) for text, image, audio, embeddings, and other capabilities

diagrams.name: middleware_and_pipeline
diagrams.title: Middleware & Request Pipeline
diagrams.description: Middleware classes that wrap AI prompt pipelines, including conversation memory middleware

diagrams.name: testing_support
diagrams.title: Testing & Fake Support
diagrams.description: Test helpers, fake dispatchers, and assertion utilities enabling test-time faking of AI providers
